lines.speaker: Amiga
lines.es: Confirmamos para las seis y media?
lines.en: Do we confirm for six thirty?

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Si, a las seis y media me queda perfecto.
lines.en: Yes, six thirty works perfectly for me.

responseExercise.prompt: Someone asks to confirm a time. Choose the best coordination response.

choices.text: Si, a las seis y media me queda perfecto.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Clear and direct confirmation.

choices.text: Creo que si, salvo que se complique el trafico.
choices.feedback: Reasonable, but less firm than a direct confirmation.

choices.text: A esa hora no se, te digo cuando salga.
choices.feedback: Off-target for confirming a specific plan time.

lines.speaker: Amiga
lines.es: Buenisimo, entonces nos vemos alla.
lines.en: Great, then we'll see each other there.

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Dale, llego unos minutos antes.
lines.en: Sounds good, I'll arrive a few minutes early.

responseExercise.prompt: The time is confirmed. Pick the best follow-up.

choices.text: Dale, llego unos minutos antes.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Friendly and practical.

choices.text: Perfecto, te escribo cuando este cerca.
choices.feedback: Natural and useful, though slightly less specific.

choices.text: Bueno, si me atraso, mejor lo movemos en el momento.
choices.feedback: Off-target once the plan is already confirmed.

lines.speaker: Hermano
lines.es: Hola, donde estas ahora?
lines.en: Hi, where are you right now?

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Estoy saliendo de la oficina, llego en veinte minutos.
lines.en: I'm leaving the office, I'll arrive in twenty minutes.

responseExercise.prompt: Someone asks where you are. Choose a practical real-time reply.

choices.text: Estoy saliendo de la oficina, llego en veinte minutos.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Location plus ETA helps coordination.

choices.text: Voy en camino, te actualizo en un rato.
choices.feedback: Reasonable, but less precise than giving location and ETA.

choices.text: No se bien, ando por ahi todavia.
choices.feedback: Off-target because it does not support planning.

lines.speaker: Hermano
lines.es: Perfecto, te espero en la entrada principal.
lines.en: Perfect, I'll wait for you at the main entrance.

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Listo, cuando llegue te llamo.
lines.en: Great, I'll call you when I arrive.

responseExercise.prompt: They'll wait at the main entrance. Pick the best coordinating response.

choices.text: Listo, cuando llegue te llamo.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Clear next action.

choices.text: Dale, te aviso apenas este afuera.
choices.feedback: Natural and useful, just slightly less specific.

choices.text: Mejor entra tu y yo veo como encontrarte.
choices.feedback: Off-target for a clear meeting point plan.

lines.speaker: Amigo
lines.es: Ya saliste o todavia estas en casa?
lines.en: Did you leave already or are you still at home?

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Ya sali, voy en camino.
lines.en: I already left, I'm on the way.

responseExercise.prompt: A friend checks if you already left. Choose the best response.

choices.text: Ya sali, voy en camino.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Short and directly useful.

choices.text: Sali hace poco, calculo llegar pronto.
choices.feedback: Natural and reasonable, but less immediate.

choices.text: Todavia no, pero igual llego cuando pueda.
choices.feedback: Off-target when asked for a clear current status.

lines.speaker: Amigo
lines.es: Buenisimo, te guardo sitio.
lines.en: Great, I'll save you a spot.

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Gracias, en diez minutos estoy ahi.
lines.en: Thanks, I'll be there in ten minutes.

responseExercise.prompt: They will save you a spot. Pick the best follow-up with ETA.

choices.text: Gracias, en diez minutos estoy ahi.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Polite and specific timing.

choices.text: Gracias, no me demoro mucho.
choices.feedback: Natural, though less precise than a concrete ETA.

choices.text: Si se llena, despues vemos donde sentarnos.
choices.feedback: Off-target for immediate arrival coordination.

lines.speaker: Companera
lines.es: Perdon, se me complico. Podemos reprogramar para manana?
lines.en: Sorry, something came up. Can we reschedule for tomorrow?

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Claro, manana a la misma hora me funciona.
lines.en: Sure, tomorrow at the same time works for me.

responseExercise.prompt: Someone asks to reschedule for tomorrow. Choose the most helpful response.

choices.text: Claro, manana a la misma hora me funciona.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Accepts and confirms the new time.

choices.text: Si, manana podria ser, te confirmo mas tarde.
choices.feedback: Reasonable, but less decisive for coordination.

choices.text: Manana no se, mejor hablamos sin hora fija.
choices.feedback: Off-target because it removes clear scheduling.

lines.speaker: Companera
lines.es: Gracias por la flexibilidad.
lines.en: Thanks for being flexible.

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: No hay problema, nos vemos manana.
lines.en: No problem, see you tomorrow.

responseExercise.prompt: They thank you for being flexible. Pick the best closing response.

choices.text: No hay problema, nos vemos manana.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Polite and closes the new plan clearly.

choices.text: Todo bien, seguimos en contacto.
choices.feedback: Natural, but less specific than confirming tomorrow.

choices.text: Si vuelve a pasar, mejor cancelamos del todo.
choices.feedback: Off-target for a cooperative reschedule exchange.

lines.speaker: Amiga
lines.es: Donde nos encontramos exactamente?
lines.en: Where exactly should we meet?

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: En la entrada del cafe, junto al semaforo.
lines.en: At the cafe entrance, next to the traffic light.

responseExercise.prompt: They ask for the exact meeting point. Choose the best answer.

choices.text: En la entrada del cafe, junto al semaforo.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Specific and easy to find.

choices.text: Cerca del cafe, por esa zona.
choices.feedback: Understandable, but less precise for coordination.

choices.text: Vamos viendo cuando lleguemos cada uno.
choices.feedback: Off-target because it avoids setting a clear point.

lines.speaker: Amiga
lines.es: Perfecto, cuando llegue te escribo.
lines.en: Perfect, when I arrive I'll text you.

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Dale, yo estare esperando ahi.
lines.en: Great, I'll be waiting there.

responseExercise.prompt: They'll text when they arrive. Pick the most natural reply.

choices.text: Dale, yo estare esperando ahi.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Confirms shared plan clearly.

choices.text: Perfecto, yo tambien te aviso si me muevo.
choices.feedback: Natural and helpful, but slightly less direct.

choices.text: Si no te veo, entro y despues salgo otra vez.
choices.feedback: Off-target for a stable meeting-point plan.

lines.speaker: Amigo
lines.es: Entonces, hoy hacemos compras y despues cenamos?
lines.en: So today we do groceries and then have dinner?

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Si, ese plan me parece bien.
lines.en: Yes, that plan sounds good to me.

responseExercise.prompt: A friend confirms today's sequence of plans. Choose the best response.

choices.text: Si, ese plan me parece bien.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Simple and clear agreement.

choices.text: Si, aunque quiza cambiamos segun como vaya la tarde.
choices.feedback: Reasonable, but less firm for coordination.

choices.text: No se, primero vemos si tengo ganas.
choices.feedback: Off-target for confirming a shared plan.

lines.speaker: Amigo
lines.es: Buenisimo, te paso a buscar a las cinco.
lines.en: Great, I'll pick you up at five.

lines.speaker: Tu
lines.es: Perfecto, estare listo a esa hora.
lines.en: Perfect, I'll be ready at that time.

responseExercise.prompt: They offer pickup at 5:00. Pick the strongest confirmation response.

choices.text: Perfecto, estare listo a esa hora.
choices.feedback: Great fit. Confirms readiness and timing.

choices.text: Excelente, te confirmo unos minutos antes.
choices.feedback: Natural and good, though it adds slight uncertainty.

choices.text: Si me atraso, arranca sin mi y luego llego.
choices.feedback: Off-target for a coordinated pickup commitment.
